Off Calendar Apr-30-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Rudolph Garrett, Tel. 415.206.9839), Defendant/Claimant appearing on his own behalf.

No other appearance. Defendant Rudolph Garrett's Claim of Exemption is granted in part. Judgment debtor to pay $23.42 per month beginning May 1, 2012. The levying officer is ordered to release any earnings or funds held to the judgment debtor. Order signed. Pro Tem Judge: Ernst Halperin, not reported.
